title: Automate Nucleo entropy reset regression test
description: Add script or test in tests/ or CI that boots Nucleo firmware in Renode, exercises STM32 entropy init, asserts RNG IRQ handling, uses canonical reset macro to clear IRQ without regression, verifies post-reset entropy progress. Keep fully deterministic/offline. Update Renode platform if needed. Link to project-LICHEN-oqv7.9.
